prompt: Create a polished anime-style portrait illustration of Ami, shown from mid-thigh to just above the head, standing indoors in a warm traditional Japanese room. She has a short glossy black bob haircut with a center part and slightly tousled ends, but her face is deliberately hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in a soft brown skin-tone gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth. She wears a cream-white yukata with exactly 11 visible red flower motifs: 1 on the upper right chest, 1 on the left chest near the crossing collar, 1 on the right sleeve, 1 on the far left sleeve edge, 1 on the lower right sleeve cuff, 1 small flower on the right sleeve, 1 on the lower left sleeve, 1 on the lower skirt left, 1 on the lower skirt center, 1 on the lower skirt right, and 1 partial flower near the left shoulder area. The yukata has wide soft sleeves, realistic folds, and a crossed collar. Add a vivid red obi belt around the waist with a pale braided cord tied in a bow at the front center. Behind her head place a large flat red circle like a sun disk, filling much of the upper background. The room background should be dark wood with softly blurred shelves and warm amber lighting, creating a cinematic depth-of-field effect. Use high-quality gpt-image-2 anime rendering, clean linework, detailed fabric shadows, glossy hair highlights, warm skin lighting on the neck and hands, vertical portrait composition, no text, no watermark.
